qa_pairs.question: Which accounts have related district records where a7 is exactly '13', have related disp records, and have related loan records with status exactly 'C'?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT account.account_id FROM account
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
JOIN disp ON account.account_id = disp.account_id
JOIN loan ON account.account_id = loan.account_id
WHERE district.a7 = '13' AND loan.status = 'C'
qa_pairs.question_pre_fix: Which accounts belong to district 13 and have loans with status C?
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which account entities having at least one related district record (linked on account.district_id = district.district_id) with a7 equal to '13', having at least one related disp record (linked on account.account_id = disp.account_id), having at least one related loan record (linked on account.account_id = loan.account_id) with status equal to 'C'?

qa_pairs.question: Which accounts owned by customers in Rokycany, west Bohemia have loans with exactly 3703.0 payments, status D, and a date on or after 1996-12-15?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT account.account_id FROM account
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
JOIN disp ON account.account_id = disp.account_id
JOIN loan ON account.account_id = loan.account_id
WHERE loan.payments = 3703.0 AND disp.type = 'OWNER' AND loan.date >= '1996-12-15' AND loan.status = 'D' AND district.a2 = 'Rokycany' AND district.a3 = 'west Bohemia'

qa_pairs.question: Which accounts have a weekly fee, are linked to Rychnov nad Kneznou district with a13 equal to 2.44, have loans with 6631.0 payments, and transactions where operation is PREVOD Z UCTU and account is 52673673.0?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT account.account_id FROM account
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
JOIN loan ON account.account_id = loan.account_id
JOIN trans ON account.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE trans.operation = 'PREVOD Z UCTU' AND district.a13 = 2.44 AND loan.payments = 6631.0 AND district.a2 = 'Rychnov nad Kneznou' AND trans.account = 52673673.0 AND account.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE'
